Skip to contents
AARP 0.1.0
    • Forward model basics
    • Depth-series simulation
    • Stage 1 — Bayesian kinetics estimation
    • Stage 2 — Holocene temperature reconstruction
  • Reference

Package index

Forward model

Core Arrhenius/power-law racemization model and thermal integration utilities.

arrhenius()
Arrhenius rate constant for amino acid racemization
dRacPL()
Incremental racemization in power-law space
racemize()
Simulate D/L accumulation over a full temperature history
racemizeSample()
Simulate racemization for a single downcore sample (with burial damping)
racemize_one_depth()
Simulate AAR racemization for a single sediment sample at a given depth
racemize_depth_series()
Simulate AAR racemization for a depth series of sediment samples
predict_heating_DL()
Predict D/L for lab heating experiments
get_temp_at_time()
Return lake bottom water temperature at one or more times
diffusion_attenuation()
Thermal diffusion attenuation factor for a periodic temperature signal
dampSedTemps()
Apply sediment burial temperature damping

Age–depth models

Construct and query age–depth relationships for sediment cores.

make_age_model()
Build an age-depth model from tie-point depths and ages
rate_to_age_model()
Build an age-depth model from a constant sedimentation rate

Simulation

Generate synthetic heating-experiment and downcore D/L datasets for testing and vignette demonstrations.

sim_heating_data()
Simulate lab heating experiment D/L data
sim_downcore_data()
Simulate downcore D/L observations from a known-temperature lake
default_AAR_params
Default AAR kinetic parameters

Bayesian inference

Log-likelihood, log-prior, and log-posterior functions for the two-stage MCMC framework, plus the MCMC sampler itself.

log_lik_heating()
Log-likelihood for lab heating experiment data
log_lik_downcore()
Log-likelihood for downcore D/L data at known temperature
log_lik_temperature()
Log-likelihood for downcore D/L data at unknown temperature
log_prior_kinetics()
Log-prior for kinetic parameters
log_prior_temperature()
Log-prior for temperature history control points
log_posterior_kinetics()
Log-posterior for kinetic parameters (Stage 1)
log_posterior_temperature()
Log-posterior for temperature history (Stage 2)
run_mcmc()
Random-walk Metropolis-Hastings MCMC sampler

Visualisation & diagnostics

Trace plots, posterior density plots, temperature reconstructions, and posterior predictive checks.

plot_mcmc_chains()
Trace plots for MCMC output
plot_posterior_kinetics()
Posterior density plots for kinetic parameters
plot_temperature_reconstruction()
Temperature history reconstruction plot
posterior_predictive_DL()
Posterior predictive D/L depth profiles
plotInputs()
Plot temperature inputs for a damped sediment record

On this page

Developed by Nick McKay.
